# references on tasks: add / list (with backlinks) / rm (idempotent) / warn-not-block
mkdir proj
cd proj
exec mtt init
stdout 'initialized'

exec mtt add 'A'
stdout 'created t1'
exec mtt add 'B'
stdout 'created t2'
exec mtt note add auth-design
stdout 'created auth-design'

# c14: a carrier with no refs and no backlinks prints (none) under each header,
# not a bare empty header (mirrors dep list)
exec mtt ref list t1
stdout 'refs:\n  \(none\)\nbacklinks:\n  \(none\)'

# add a task ref (target exists -> ok, no warning)
exec mtt ref add t2 task:t1 --label blocks
stdout 'added task:t1 to t2'
! stderr 'warning'

# outgoing ref shows [ok] + label; the target gains a backlink
exec mtt ref list t2
stdout 'refs:'
stdout 'task:t1  \[ok\]  \(blocks\)'
exec mtt ref list t1
stdout 'backlinks:'
stdout 'task:t2'

# a note ref to an existing note is ok
exec mtt ref add t2 note:auth-design
stdout 'added note:auth-design to t2'

# warn-not-block: a dangling task target is stored, warns, exits 0
exec mtt ref add t2 task:t999
stdout 'added task:t999 to t2'
stderr 'warning: task:t999 is dangling'

# a missing note target (KB wired) is dangling too (D5), not unverified
exec mtt ref add t1 note:ghost
stderr 'warning: note:ghost is dangling'

# a well-formed url is unverified and does NOT warn
exec mtt ref add t1 url:https://example.com/x
! stderr 'warning'

# comment kind is rejected (t2)
! exec mtt ref add t2 comment:t1
stderr 'comments arrive in t2'

# malformed url -> usage error
! exec mtt ref add t2 url:example.com
stderr 'need scheme and host'

# ref rm is idempotent: removing twice both succeed (exit 0)
exec mtt ref add t2 task:t1
exec mtt ref rm t2 task:t1
stdout 'removed task:t1 from t2'
exec mtt ref rm t2 task:t1
stdout 'removed task:t1 from t2'

# ref add on a missing carrier -> not found (exit 4)
! exec mtt ref add t999 task:t1
stderr 'not found'

# --json emits the ref object with status
exec mtt ref add t2 task:t1 --json
stdout '"kind": "task"'
stdout '"status": "ok"'
